title: Upon Julia's Clothes
content:
Whenas in silks my Julia goes,
Then, then, methinks, how sweetly flows
That liquefaction of her clothes!

Next, when I cast mine eyes and see
That brave vibration each way free,
Oh how that glittering taketh me!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Julia's Clothes"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
